Terms of Service

Effective Date: July 9, 2026 | Application Version 1.0.0

1. Acceptance of Terms

By downloading or using Nashik Kumbh Navigator, you agree to these Terms of Service. Designed for the Nashik Kumbh Mela Simhastha 2027, the application assists pilgrims with real-time navigation, ghat schedules, and safety notifications.

2. Permitted Pilgrimage Use

The app is provided for lawful personal navigation and safety coordination during the Kumbh Mela festival. Users agree not to submit false emergency SOS alerts or malicious crowd reports.

3. Emergency SOS & Navigation Disclaimers

While the application integrates with official emergency helplines (108/100) and real-time maps, users must always follow official physical signage, police instructions, and on-ground crowd control personnel.

4. Modification & Termination

We reserve the right to update navigation routes, temporary ghat closures, or safety protocols at any time in coordination with the Nashik Kumbh Mela Administration.
